message:
fix(bubbletea-macros): suppress clippy::unused_unit in empty state snapshot

When no fields are tracked with #[state], the generated __snapshot_state
function returns unit. This was triggering clippy::unused_unit warnings
when built with -D warnings.

Changes:
- Replace explicit `-> () { () }` with `{}` (implicit unit return)
- Add #[allow(clippy::unused_unit)] attribute for extra safety
- Fixed in both non-generic and generic variants

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
